'''Tiran''' was a prestigious [[Drall/Legends|Drall]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who lived over [[35,000 BBY|ten thousand]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the founding of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]<ref name="Med" /> in [[25,053 BBY]].<ref name="Encyclopedia">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref> Tiran developed the [[Theory of Universal Reference]], which consisted of two facts which<ref name="Med" /> he<ref name="CSWE" /> proved: first, that [[Time/Legends|time]] and [[Realspace/Legends|space]] were unified, and second, that objects could not travel at the speed of light. Tiran gained [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] fame because of this discovery, though it was later proved that while objects could not travel at the speed of light, it was possible to bypass the light-speed barrier and travel faster than light—a discovery that allowed for the development of the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]].<ref name="Med" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tiran was first mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' by [[Michael Reaves]] and [[Steve Perry]].<ref name="Med" />
